title: Implementing DeepMind innovation: Deep research API
summary: Google DeepMind's Deep Research API enables agents powered by Gemini to perform comprehensive research tasks and improve performance. The API can be implemented in applications using Google Cloud.
writeup: This Google Cloud Tech video covers the Deep Research API from Google DeepMind, which lets Gemini-powered agents carry out comprehensive research tasks and improve their performance. It matters because the API is built to be implemented in applications through Google Cloud, connecting DeepMind research to deployable agent workflows. The key takeaways are the API's role in enabling multi-agent systems and the path for integrating it into Cloud-based applications.
